# Actions Insights
> GitHub Action that parses TRX/JUnit/NUnit/xUnit test output into PR comments, job summaries, checks, and HTML artifacts.

## Setup (start here)
- AI Setup Guide: /docs/setup/ai-setup
- Quick Start: /docs/setup/quick-start
- Setup Checklist: /docs/setup/checklist
- Choose outputs: /docs/setup/choose-outputs

## Setup guide
- Prepare test output: /docs/setup/prepare-test-output
- Add the action: /docs/setup/add-action
- Example workflows: /docs/setup/example-workflows
- History repository: /docs/setup/history-repository

## Integration rules (read before editing workflows)
- Job-level permissions must satisfy every step in the job (contents: write for release jobs)
- Use continue-on-error: true on ancillary reporting steps (if: always() alone is not enough). Omit it when reporting integrity should fail CI — it also hides total action crashes.
- Guard history-enabled on pull_request workflows (fork PRs cannot access secrets)
- AI Setup Guide workflow integration rules: /docs/setup/ai-setup#workflow-integration-rules

## Reference
- Configuration: /docs/reference/configuration
- Architecture: /docs/reference/architecture

## History repository
- Deployment: /docs/history-repository/deployment
- Configuration: /docs/history-repository/configuration
- Troubleshooting: /docs/history-repository/troubleshooting

## Examples
- .NET workflow: https://github.com/mzbrau/actions-insights/blob/main/examples/dotnet.yml
- Java workflow: https://github.com/mzbrau/actions-insights/blob/main/examples/java.yml
- Python workflow: https://github.com/mzbrau/actions-insights/blob/main/examples/python.yml
- JavaScript workflow: https://github.com/mzbrau/actions-insights/blob/main/examples/javascript.yml
